name: IdsEdwClmnSumRcvdIncmFBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.mismatches_TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumRcvdIncmFBal; SELECT RcvdIncmF.SRC_SYS_CD, RcvdIncmF.BILL_ENTY_UNIQ_KEY, RcvdIncmF.DUE_YR_MO_SK, RcvdIncmF.BILL_INCM_RCPT_BILL_CNTR_ID, RcvdIncmF.RCPT_YR_MO_SK, RcvdIncmF.BILL_INCM_RCPT_CRT_DTM, RcvdIncmF.BILL_INCM_RCPT_ERN_INCM_AMT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.mismatches_TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumRcvdIncmFBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.RCVD_INCM_F RcvdIncmF FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_RCVD_INCM_F BRcvdIncm ON RcvdIncmF.SRC_SYS_CD = BRcvdIncm.SRC_SYS_CD AND RcvdIncmF.BILL_ENTY_UNIQ_KEY = BRcvdIncm.BILL_ENTY_UNIQ_KEY AND RcvdIncmF.DUE_YR_MO_SK = BRcvdIncm.DUE_YR_MO_SK AND RcvdIncmF.BILL_INCM_RCPT_BILL_CNTR_ID = BRcvdIncm.BILL_INCM_RCPT_BILL_CNTR_ID AND RcvdIncmF.RCPT_YR_MO_SK = BRcvdIncm.RCPT_YR_MO_SK AND RcvdIncmF.BILL_INCM_RCPT_CRT_DTM = BRcvdIncm.BILL_INCM_RCPT_CRT_DTM WHERE RcvdIncmF.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND RcvdIncmF.BILL_INCM_RCPT_ERN_INCM_AMT <> BRcvdIncm.BILL_INCM_RCPT_ERN_INCM_AMT; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.notify_TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumRcvdIncmFBal; SELECT TOP 1 'ROW TO ROW BALANCING IDS - EDW MBR D OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.notify_TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumRcvdIncmFBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.mismatches_TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumRcvdIncmFBal;
